column1: TD 4 | The 5 am advisory is in. TD 4 will slowly strengthen over the next 24 hours as it moves into the Gulf. The track will stay west of Tampa Bay, but still close enough to us for widespread showers and storms, isolated tornados and some minor storm surge. Details all morning on Good Morning Tampa Bay.
Just keep on moving West!

Not really relevant to this storm, but thought I'd share anyway.
I live in Pasco county now, but when hurricane Irma hit, I lived in Lee county. I took in a few people and animals that had no other place to ride it out, and found out quickly how ill mannered some folks can be.
Someone ate all of my hurricane snacks and then pooped in my recliner. I wish I could say it was a dog, but that would be a lie.
It was my step son's girlfriend's father.
Giving him safe shelter might have been the nice thing to do, but he was a nightmare house guest.
